name: SecurityScorecard
description: Security ratings platform measuring cybersecurity risk across 10 factors providing continuous monitoring, third-party risk management, and industry benchmarking

actions.name: Get Company Scorecard
actions.description: Retrieve a company's security scorecard summary including overall score, grade, and factor scores

parameters.name: scorecard_identifier
parameters.description: Domain name of the company (e.g., example.com)

actions.name: Get Factor Scores
actions.description: Retrieve detailed factor-level scores for a company across all 10 risk categories

actions.name: Get Score History
actions.description: Retrieve historical factor scores for a company over time

actions.name: List Portfolio Companies
actions.description: Retrieve all companies in the monitored portfolio with their current scores

parameters.name: portfolio_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the portfolio

parameters.name: grade
parameters.description: Filter by grade (A, B, C, D, F)

actions.name: List Issues
actions.description: Retrieve security issues detected for a company including severity and affected assets

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (positive, info, low, medium, high)

actions.name: Get Overall Score
actions.description: Retrieve the overall security rating score for a specific company

actions.name: Search Companies
actions.description: Search for companies by domain name to view their security posture

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve alerts for score changes and new issues detected in the portfolio

parameters.name: portfolio_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the portfolio
